body:
Found endpoints:
- / (SPA root, returns Angular app HTML)
- /robots.txt -> Disallow: /ftp
- /ftp/ -> Directory listing enabled (express.js serve-index)
- /api/ -> 500 Unexpected path
- /rest/ -> 500 Unexpected path
- /api/Users -> 401 No Authorization header (protected)
- /api/Products -> 200 JSON product list (public)
- /api/Products/{id} -> likely accessible
- /rest/product/search?q= -> 500 with empty q
- /socket.io/ -> 400 Transport unknown (Socket.io present)
- /assets/public/favicon_js.ico -> public asset
- Error pages reveal: Express ^4.22.1, paths at /juice-shop/build/routes/
- X-Recruiting header: /#/jobs
- UI is Angular (SPA with hash routing)
